rounds.title: Place stitch marker for arm
rounds.sourceText: Place a stitch marker in the space between Row 11 and Row 12. (This is where you will begin working the first arm)

statements.sourceText: Place a stitch marker in the space between Row 11 and Row 12. (This is where you will begin working the first arm)

operation.instruction: Place a stitch marker in the space between Row 11 and Row 12. This is where you will begin working the first arm.
operation.note: This is where you will begin working the first arm

rounds.title: Place stitch marker for second arm
rounds.sourceText: Place a stitch marker in the space between Row 14 and Row 15. (This is where you will begin working the second arm)

statements.sourceText: Place a stitch marker in the space between Row 14 and Row 15. (This is where you will begin working the second arm)

operation.note: This is where you will begin working the second arm

statements.sourceText: join yarn in the following stitch

rounds.sourceText: Return to the body. Skip 1 stitch next to Leg 1, and join yarn in the following stitch.
rounds.title: Join yarn for Leg 2
Arm 1
rounds.sourceText: Attach yarn between Rows 11–12. CH 1, SC in same sp, HDC in next sp, 3 DC in next sp, CH 2, SS in same sp. FO
Attach yarn on opposite side between Rows 14–15. CH 2, 3 DC in same sp, HDC in next sp, SC in next sp, SS. FO
rounds.title: Arm 2

operation.instruction: Attach yarn on opposite side between Rows 14–15

statements.sourceText: Attach yarn on opposite side between Rows 14–15

operation.instruction: Attach yarn in the top corner of the head.

statements.sourceText: Attach yarn in the top corner of the head.

rounds.sourceText: Attach yarn in the top corner of the head. CH 2, 2 DC in the next sp, CH 2, SS into the same sp. FO
rounds.title: Ear 1

note.message: Move to the opposite top corner, at the same level as the last st of the first ear. Attach yarn.
note.sourceText: Move to the opposite top corner, at the same level as the last st of the first ear. Attach yarn.

statements.sourceText: Move to the opposite top corner, at the same level as the last st of the first ear. Attach yarn.

rounds.sourceText: Move to the opposite top corner, at the same level as the last st of the first ear. Attach yarn. CH 2, 2 DC in the same sp, CH 2, SS into the same sp. FO
rounds.title: Ear 2

note.message: Repeat the entire pattern to create a second identical piece.
note.sourceText: Repeat the entire pattern to create a second identical piece.

statements.sourceText: Repeat the entire pattern to create a second identical piece.

rounds.sourceText: Repeat the entire pattern to create a second identical piece.
rounds.title: MAKE A SECOND PANEL

operation.instruction: Using a yarn needle, weave in all loose ends securely on the wrong side of the work.

statements.sourceText: Using a yarn needle, weave in all loose ends securely on the wrong side of the work.

rounds.sourceText: Using a yarn needle, weave in all loose ends securely on the wrong side of the work.
rounds.title: Weave in Ends
Add eyes and nose

note.message: Use safety eyes, or Embroider using yarn (suggested position of the eyes - between row 4 and 5)
note.sourceText: Use safety eyes, or Embroider using yarn (suggested position of the eyes - between row 4 and 5)

statements.sourceText: Use safety eyes, or Embroider using yarn (suggested position of the eyes - between row 4 and 5)

rounds.sourceText: Use safety eyes, or Embroider using yarn (suggested position of the eyes - between row 4 and 5)

rounds.title: Joining the Pieces
rounds.sourceText: Place both panels together with wrong sides facing each other. Attach yarn at any point along the edge. Work slip stitches evenly around, inserting your hook through both layers Continue around the entire shape to join

statements.sourceText: Place both panels together with wrong sides facing each other.

note.message: Place both panels together with wrong sides facing each other.
note.sourceText: Place both panels together with wrong sides facing each other.

statements.sourceText: Attach yarn at any point along the edge.
Work slip stitches evenly around, inserting your hook through both layers Continue around the entire shape to join

operation.instruction: Work slip stitches evenly around, inserting your hook through both layers. Continue around the entire shape to join.

rounds.title: Optional stuffing
rounds.sourceText: Optional: Lightly stuff the bear before fully closing, or leave flat for a keychain-style finish.

statements.sourceText: Optional: Lightly stuff the bear before fully closing, or leave flat for a keychain-style finish.

note.message: Optional: Lightly stuff the bear before fully closing, or leave flat for a keychain-style finish.
note.sourceText: Optional: Lightly stuff the bear before fully closing, or leave flat for a keychain-style finish.

rounds.title: Fasten off and weave in ends
rounds.sourceText: Fasten off and weave in all ends securely.

statements.sourceText: Fasten off and weave in all ends securely.

operation.instruction: Fasten off and weave in all ends securely.
